name: The Daly Round Sports Bar + Indoor Golf
about: The Daly Round Sports Bar + Indoor Golf combines a premium indoor golf simulator experience with an upscale bar and lounge environment. They feature four state-of-the-art simulator bays that accommodate up to six players per bay, rented by the hour. The venue offers an immersive golf experience on world-renowned courses alongside a full service bar featuring premium spirits, craft beers, and crafted cocktails. Catering to both golfers and socializers, the facility is available for group outings, corporate events, and private parties, with versatile spaces tailored to specific needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Four state-of-the-art simulator bays provide an immersive and realistic experience
Access to world-renowned golf courses from indoors
Full bar and lounge environment perfect for socializing between rounds
Versatile space available for private events and group outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a note that kitchen closes 1-2 hours before venue closing
Upscale bar with premium spirits, craft beers, and crafted cocktails available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are not provided. Rental clubs are available for $35 per visit.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, allowing you to purchase food and beverages on-site. There are no indications that outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on a simulator takes approximately one hour per bay. The minimum rental time is one hour, regardless of how many players are in the bay.

faq.question: Is The Daly Round kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a strict age restriction of 21 and over after 9pm.
